summary: Book flipped to 100% cash today: all 5 prior positions (UUUU, CAI, AVO, NTSK and the critical DVLT dilution/crypto position) were closed manually outside the bot between 07:47-08:49Z per broker reconciliation, so the live risk is now entirely on the buy side, where radar's #1 candidate BOLD (score 5.11) is a distressed reverse-merger leaving pre-merger holders only ~3.7% of the combined entity - a hard avoid, not a dip to buy.

flags.why: Radar top candidate (5.11) but this is a distressed reverse-merger pop, not organic strength: definitive Serapha Bio merger agreement (6/22-6/23) plus $230M concurrent private placement leaves pre-merger Boundless holders only ~3.7% of combined 'Serapha Bio' (Nasdaq: AATD); own oncology pipeline halted, ~75% workforce cut, $3-5M one-time severance. Reported +61.7% premarket pop today is sell-the-news risk on a stock in wind-down. No change this cycle - still avoid, and intel.json's own alert already agrees.

Radar #2 candidate (5.93) but carries a live $100M ATM (since 2024) plus a Feb-2026 $100M underwritten offering (20M shares at $5.00) now underwater at ~$3.75-3.83 - financing overhang persists even though today's move is driven by BLA-filing/insider-buy momentum, not new dilution. No new filing found this cycle.

Automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 1/13/26, already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM - ongoing drip-dilution setup. Currently well below buy threshold (3.33 vs 6.25) so moot for now; re-check if score rises.

dilution_watch.note: Definitive Serapha Bio merger plus $230M concurrent private placement; existing holders diluted to ~3.7% pro forma, combined entity to trade as 'AATD'.
$107.6M net underwritten offering (20M shares at $5.00), now underwater; $100M ATM (since 2024) remains active. No new filing found this cycle.
Automatic shelf effective, used twice via 424B5; $50M ATM active. Below buy threshold currently.

disagreements: No substantive disagreement with intel.json this cycle - its BOLD warning (distressed reverse-merger, avoid chasing) matches our critical flag. Note: data_quality.json's nightly audit (run 08:18Z) still lists CAI as a HELD ticker with a 3% broker/cache price drift, but the CAI position was closed manually at 08:49Z, after that audit ran - the flag is now stale and CAI is flat, not a live pricing risk.
